title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. glabrum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. glabrum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of rockrose include the ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Rockrose can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
